pageContext.name: Black Legion Helbrute
pageContext.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are proud to present the Black Legion Helbrute Collectible Figure! Hailing from the dark sci-fi/fantasy universe of Warhammer 40,000, the Helbrute represents the darkest perversion of the Space Marine Dreadnought! Every Helbrute, like a Dreadnought is piloted by a living being. Helbrutes, however, are piloted by Chaos Space Marines who have been driven to the edge of madness. They are implanted into the machine, linking their nervous systems and becoming a single destructive war machine!  This figure stands at an impressive 9.13 inches tall, and features all the terrifying and awe-inspiring aspects of the Black Legion any fan of Warhammer would know to expect, from the dark armor to elements of the post-Heresey iconography with arrows surrounding eyes, around its heart, jagged fangs around the gun barrels and heart, and a massive hammer, used to commit any act, no matter how vile to appease their god.  No Chaos Space Marine army is complete without a dreadnought- and what better dreadnought is there than one driven by madness incarnate? Add the Black Legion Helbrute Collectible Figure to your collection today!
